subcodes.first_line: After rendering praise and thanksgiving unto Him Who is the Goal of all worlds, and unto His chosen ones and His loved ones, this missive is submitted before thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از حمد و ثنای مقصود عالمیان و اصفیا و اولیای او عرض میشود مکتوب آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power of imagination; thought; right intention
